query_helpers.description: List high-level source roots, files, modules, dependencies, and runtime surfaces.
query_helpers.name: repository_overview
query_helpers.query: MATCH (n) WHERE n:SourceRoot OR n:File OR n:Module OR n:Dependency OR n:APIEndpoint OR n:Component RETURN n.id, n.label, n.path LIMIT 100

query_helpers.description: Find concrete semantic definitions by label or qualified name.
query_helpers.name: symbol_lookup
query_helpers.query: MATCH (s:Class) WHERE s.label = $name OR s.qualified_name = $name RETURN s.id, s.label, s.qualified_name, s.path UNION ALL MATCH (s:Function) WHERE s.label = $name OR s.qualified_name = $name RETURN s.id, s.label, s.qualified_name, s.path UNION ALL MATCH (s:Method) WHERE s.label = $name OR s.qualified_name = $name RETURN s.id, s.label, s.qualified_name, s.path UNION ALL MATCH (s:Variable) WHERE s.label = $name OR s.qualified_name = $name RETURN s.id, s.label, s.qualified_name, s.path UNION ALL MATCH (s:Constant) WHERE s.label = $name OR s.qualified_name = $name RETURN s.id, s.label, s.qualified_name, s.path UNION ALL MATCH (s:ClassAttribute) WHERE s.label = $name OR s.qualified_name = $name RETURN s.id, s.label, s.qualified_name, s.path UNION ALL MATCH (s:InstanceAttribute) WHERE s.label = $name OR s.qualified_name = $name RETURN s.id, s.label, s.qualified_name, s.path UNION ALL MATCH (s:Property) WHERE s.label = $name OR s.qualified_name = $name RETURN s.id, s.label, s.qualified_name, s.path UNION ALL MATCH (s:Parameter) WHERE s.label = $name OR s.qualified_name = $name RETURN s.id, s.label, s.qualified_name, s.path UNION ALL MATCH (s:TypeAlias) WHERE s.label = $name OR s.qualified_name = $name RETURN s.id, s.label, s.qualified_name, s.path LIMIT 25

query_helpers.description: Find a named class, function, method, variable, or constant definition.
query_helpers.name: definition_context
query_helpers.query: MATCH (d) WHERE d:Class OR d:Function OR d:Method OR d:Variable OR d:Constant RETURN d.id, d.label, d.kind, d.path LIMIT 50

query_helpers.description: Find call expressions and resolved callable targets near a symbol.
query_helpers.name: callgraph_neighborhood
query_helpers.query: MATCH (c:CallExpression)-[:FROM_ResolvesTo]->(:ResolvesTo)-[:TO_ResolvesTo]->(target) RETURN c.id, c.path, target.id, target.label LIMIT 50

query_helpers.name: dependency_map
query_helpers.query: MATCH (i:ImportDeclaration)-[:FROM_DependsOn]->(:DependsOn)-[:TO_DependsOn]->(d:Dependency) RETURN i.id, i.label, d.id, d.label LIMIT 100

query_helpers.description: Inspect routes, endpoints, executed queries, and secret use.
query_helpers.name: runtime_surface
query_helpers.query: MATCH (r:Route)-[:FROM_RoutesTo]->(:RoutesTo)-[:TO_RoutesTo]->(e:APIEndpoint) RETURN r.id, r.label, e.id, e.label LIMIT 100

query_helpers.description: Find documentation chunks connected to code nodes.
query_helpers.name: documentation_context
query_helpers.query: MATCH (d:DocumentationChunk)-[:FROM_Documents]->(:Documents)-[:TO_Documents]->(n) RETURN d.id, d.label, n.id, n.label LIMIT 50

query_helpers.description: Find references that have not been resolved to a semantic target.
query_helpers.name: unresolved_references
query_helpers.query: MATCH (r:Reference) WHERE NOT EXISTS { MATCH (r)-[:FROM_ResolvesTo]->(:ResolvesTo)-[:TO_ResolvesTo]->() } RETURN r.id, r.label, r.path, r.line_start LIMIT 100
